arts.ttl: Alexander Isak PSR truth emerges amid Arsenal and Liverpool summer transfer battle
arts.sum: Football finance expert Kieran Maguire has explained how Arsenal and rivals Liverpool would actually be able to afford the £150m-rated summer transfer of Alexander Isak from Newcastle United. The football finance also explained how in Arsenal and their Premier League title rivals' cases, they have both positioned themselves favourably in regards to Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR) so that they would truly be able to rock Newcastle with a monster offer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta makes transfer enquiry as Gabriel injury timeframe revealed

arts.ttl: Arsenal told Nico Williams wage demand as Eze transfer interest made clear
arts.sum: Williams could help take Arsenal to the next level and I think he should be at the top of their shopping list if they want to sign a left winger this summer. FL says: While signing a striker and a defensive midfielder should be Arsenal's priority, bringing in a new left winger wouldn't go amiss.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Ollie Watkins 'decision' made after £40m Aston Villa rejection
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly make a decision on whether to reignite their interest in Aston Villa's Ollie Watkins this summer after failing with a £40m swoop in January.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star suspended for Arsenal as Antonio Rudiger update emerges
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly fear Antonio Rudiger could be banned by Uefa for the Champions League first leg tie against Arsenal, as a verdict looms. "That kind of behaviour doesn't sit well with UEFA's code of conduct," a former disciplinary official has said about similar gestures in the past.
